name: Sparebanken Sor
summary: Sparebanken S√É¬∏r operates as an independent financial institution in Norway. The company operates through two segments, Retail Market and Corporate Market. It is involved in banking, securities trading, and real estate brokerage activities in Agder, Rogaland, Vestfold, and Telemark. The company also provides leasing, car loans, consumer credit, share dealing, mortgaging, and property management services; and sells general insurance, occupational pension, and group life insurance products. It conducts banking operations in 35 locations and real estate services in 18 locations. The company was founded in 1824 and is headquartered in Kristiansand, Norway.
